artifacts.name: InstancedBricks implementation
artifacts.description: Complete InstancedMesh-based brick renderer — one draw call per brick type. Implements FR-PERF-001 with per-instance color, matrix updates, geometry disposal, and MAX_INSTANCES=1000 pre-allocation.

artifacts.name: InstancedBricks unit tests
artifacts.description: 8 unit/behavioral tests covering T-FE-PERF-001-01 through T-FE-PERF-001-02c — InstancedMesh usage, per-type separation, color buffer, matrix updates, empty scene, geometry disposal, and draw-call behavioral contracts.

artifacts.name: Instanced rendering e2e performance tests
artifacts.description: 3 Playwright e2e tests: 100 bricks ≥60 FPS, 500 bricks ≥30 FPS, 1000 bricks no-crash. Uses rAF-based FPS measurement and duck-typed InstancedMesh detection.

artifacts.name: Frontend-coding handoff (Markdown)
artifacts.description: Human-readable handoff summary for frontend-review agent.

summary.work_completed: Verified and confirmed InstancedBricks.tsx implementation is complete on feature/15-instanced-mesh-rendering-tests. The component uses THREE.InstancedMesh with one mesh per brick type (≤4 draw calls), per-instance color via setColorAt, matrix updates on brick changes, geometry disposal on unmount, and MAX_INSTANCES=1000 pre-allocation for NFR-SCALE-001. All 8 unit tests and 3 e2e performance tests are in place on PR #52.
key_findings: InstancedBricks.tsx is fully implemented — no coding changes required
One InstancedMesh per brick type (4 types: 1x1, 1x2, 2x2, 2x4) = ≤4 draw calls
Per-instance color via setColorAt() with instanceColor.needsUpdate=true
Geometry disposal on unmount prevents WebGL memory leaks

human_review_required.reason: CI runners may not achieve 60/30 FPS. Consider test.slow() or environment-specific thresholds.

human_review_required.item: R3F __r3f internal API usage in tests
human_review_required.reason: Tests use R3F's internal __r3f canvas property. Consistent with existing codebase tests but may break on R3F major version upgrades.

recommended_actions: Verify InstancedBricks.tsx implementation correctness against FR-PERF-001 acceptance criteria
Check test coverage completeness for all 11 test IDs
Validate geometry disposal pattern prevents WebGL memory leaks
Confirm MAX_INSTANCES=1000 pre-allocation is appropriate for NFR-SCALE-001
